title: Visual Overhaul + Modpack Manager + Balance Pass
summary: Major UI/UX overhaul, launcher converted to modpack manager with MC launcher integration, MineColonies buffs, modded mob spawn fixes, and 1,185 new EMC entries.
changes: Launcher is now a modpack manager — syncs mods/configs, creates a TZP profile in the official Minecraft launcher, and launches it automatically
New dark theme with blue accents across the entire website and launcher UI (inspired by Cursor/Warp.dev)
Removed particle effects, glass/transparency, and animated gradients for a cleaner look
MineColonies: disease 10x rarer, guards buffed to 5x damage and 5x health
Modded mob spawns fixed — Mowzie's Mobs datapack weights boosted 5-6x, spawn rates increased across all mob types
Added 1,185 new EMC entries across 12 mods (total: 3,102) — xnet, minecolonies, Macaw's mods, upgrade_aquatic, and more
Release tag verification added to CI — builds now fail if the Git tag does not match APP_VERSION
Windows Java 21 detection expanded with glob-based scanning for all major JDK distributions

title: Java Fix + Live Log
changes: Fixed NeoForge install failing on macOS — now passes explicit Java 21 path instead of falling back to system Java
Added live Log tab for real-time launcher/update/install event debugging
Pack sync is now explicit — no more auto-download on startup

title: Custom Launcher + AI Overhaul
changes: TZP Launcher: Custom launcher replaces CurseForge distribution
Website dashboard with bug reports, crash reports, and patch notes
Claim code auth system for dashboard access
Manifest-based modpack sync with SHA256 verification
Fixed diamond/netherite zombie spam from NightmareMode
Fixed AFK disconnect (/afk now prevents idle kick)
Added 595 EMC entries (up from 8)
3 new performance mods: C2ME, Noisium, ServerCore
Hard difficulty enabled
11 FTB Quest chapters added

title: Initial Release
changes: Initial release: 172 mods on NeoForge 1.21.1
MadGod AI companion with RCON + HTTP bridge integration
MineColonies, Mekanism, Create, ProjectE, Gobber, and more
Custom TZP Vanilla Bridge mod for server integration
Mowzie's Mobs with custom biome spawn datapacks
